name: Crystal Beast Rainbow Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>究</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> レインボー・ドラゴン
desc: If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY. You can only use each of the following effects of "Crystal Beast Rainbow Dragon" once per turn. When an attack is declared involving a "Crystal Beast" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card treated as a Continuous Spell; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Crystal Beast" monster from your Deck, but negate its effects, and if you do, add 1 "Ultimate Crystal" monster from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY. You can only use each of the following effects of "Crystal Beast Rainbow Dragon" once per turn. sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting
Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystals Light of Transcending Bonds Pack

action: Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
Places destroyed cards in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
